query:
INSERT INTO product_batches (batchCode, productId, customerId, customRequirements, fobSellingPrice, productionStatus, createdAt, updatedAt)
SELECT 'SB-001-B001', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 0), 'Custom gray fabric with reinforced stitching, custom packaging with company logo', 270.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-001-B002', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 1), 'Light gray fabric upgrade, additional cushion padding, white glove delivery', 295.00, 'in_progress', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-001-B003', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 2), 'Standard version with expedited production timeline', 280.00, 'pending', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY'
UNION ALL
SELECT 'SB-001-B004', p.id, (SELECT id FROM companies ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET 3), 'Bulk order discount applied, standard packaging', 255.00, 'completed', NOW(), NOW() FROM products p WHERE p.sku = 'SB-001-GRY';
